title: Thai Potato Salad
description: A delicious and refreshing salad that combines the flavors of Thailand with the comfort of potatoes. This dish is perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Pierce the potatoes with a fork a few times and bake for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
Let the potatoes cool to room temperature.
In a large bowl, whisk together the silky dressing and yum sauce.
Add the chopped cilantro and peanuts to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the cooled potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the dressing.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
